CustomField.description: Auto-calculated. Sum of Purchase Loans divided by the Appraised Leasehold value, or if none (not a land trust), Sum of Purchase Loans divided by the Appraised Unrestricted Market Value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated. Sum of Purchase Loans divided by the Appraised Leasehold value, or if none (not a land trust), Sum of Purchase Loans divided by the Appraised Unrestricted Market Value.
CustomField.label: Loan to Value Ratio
